title: Backpack
description: A easy to use Backpack plugin for 1.21.4!
body:
![how-to-use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29d4d94d9fba7f231eb79f07673c29d5decec446.png)


1. Download the plugin for your version  
2. Drag the file into the plugins folder of your spigot or paper server  
3. Give the server a restart and the plugin is good to go!



---

![commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57245c3b592d7274e3b5ba3186cc2f3d4702a175.png)


- /backpack  
- /seebackpack (for admins)



---

![permissions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3deccfab3d561dfbc6881fc31c2a08d390e18fcb.png)


- backpack.bp  
- backpack.see
